clinical.reason: Necrotic liver metastases can mimic abscess on imaging; clinical context and tumor markers help differentiate

clinical.reason: Hilar metastases or extensive hepatic replacement causes obstructive or hepatocellular jaundice indicating advanced disease

clinical.reason: Extensive metastatic infiltration can cause sinusoidal portal hypertension and its sequelae

clinical.reason: Select patients with unresectable colorectal liver metastases are now candidates for transplant in emerging protocols
